episode_name: Great March of Return cumulative fatalities through the 82nd Friday
theater_description: Cumulative protest-wave episode from the first Great March demonstrations to the 82nd Friday cumulative tally.
geometry_method_note: The event space is the Gaza protest theater near the perimeter fence, but baseline demographic shares are taken from Gaza-wide population data.
military_area_note: This bundle does not separately model military areas; it uses cumulative civilian killings reported by PCHR.
civilian_area_note: Whole-population person-month denominators are not used for WC_DR because protest participation was not evenly distributed across sex-age groups.
split_reason: Chosen because it is the strongest boundary with total civilian killings plus cumulative child and women counts.
quality_note: The fatality side is usable, but whole-population adult-male residual risk would be heavily distorted by protest participation selection, so only disproportionality metrics are published.
